features: With the unique cup shaped bristles it cleans in between teeth and along gum line to protect you against cavity
Is gentle on enamel and gums
description: Directions Wet the brush, apply toothpaste, brush in circular motions and rinse your mouth and brush afterwards. Safety Warning Caution: Do not use for purposes other than oral hygiene. Keep out of reach of small children. Replace the toothbrush every three months or sooner if the bristles wear out.
